items.name: BOSS x NFL New York Giants Hoodie
items.description:
Launching just in time for the start of the season, the distinctive capsule offers sports aficionados and true BOSSes the chance to show their team spirit in style in real life and on Roblox. The full BOSS x NFL collection featuring 22 team designs will be available online and at BOSS retail stores, and at select national and international retailers with 6x exclusive designs available for a limited time in Super NFL Tycoon.

Earn this item in Super NFL Tycoon! Play here: roblox.com/supernfltycoon
